narrative:
Richland Twp. township has 1,358 registered voters, with 47.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.9 percentage points.
